message.content: Play songs from the artists Taylor Swift and Maroon 5, with a play time of 20 minutes and 15 minutes respectively, on Spotify.

function.name: spotify.play
function.description: Play specific tracks from a given artist for a specific time duration. Note that the provided function is in Python 3 syntax.

artist.description: The artist whose songs you want to play.

duration.description: The duration for which the songs should be played, in minutes.
